TopK(5, -deviation)
  Project(service, duration_ms, svc_avg, deviation)
    Filter((deviation > 0))
      Extend(deviation=(duration_ms - svc_avg))
        Aggregate(avg(duration_ms) as svc_avg by service [eventstats])
          Scan(main)
            pushdown.columns: [_raw, _source, _time, duration_ms, service]
